positive: A stylized, seamless repeating pattern of abstract mountain range silhouettes and stylized celestial bodies (crescent moons, stars, constellations) interlocking. The composition is balanced and symmetrical, perfect for textile printing. Use a sophisticated color palette of deep indigo, muted terracotta, and creamy bone white. Strong contrast is key, emphasizing clean edges and bold, easily recognizable shapes. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, modern, and evokes a sense of adventure and calm. Vector art style, high detail, graphic design, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, photo, text, watermark, logo, messy, noise, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low quality, muted colors, gradients
